---
title: "Bayesian Analysis of Aviation Accidents"
author: "Andreas Bogossian & Markus Kruth"
bibliography: references.bib
csl: ieee.csl
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    link-citations: true
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: true
---

# Introduction
{{< include subsections/_introduction.qmd >}}

# Data Description
{{< include subsections/_data-description.qmd >}}

# Data Modeling
{{< include subsections/_data-modeling.qmd >}}

# Model 1: Non-Hierarchical Beta-Binomial (no pooling)
{{< include subsections/_model-1.qmd >}}

# Model 2: Non-Hierarchical model (complete pooling)
{{< include subsections/_model-2.qmd >}}

# Model 3: Hierarchical Model by Aircraft Type
{{< include subsections/_model-3.qmd >}}

# Model comparison

- with LOO-CV?

# Discussion

- known issues
- potential improvements

# Conclusions

- What was learned?

# Self reflection

- What did the group learn during the project?

# References
